aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Cabrera & Sons HVAC due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current site is optimized for traditional SEO but lacks elements that cater to AI-driven search and recommendation systems.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC queries.
Enhance service pages with detailed, conversational content that AI models can extract and cite.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but posts and Q&A sections are not actively utilized.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is not actively managed or utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new listings.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with structured data to address common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to source for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, Cabrera & Sons HVAC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ content and structured data are more frequently cited by AI models, resulting in higher visibility and engagement.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational content, structured data, and authority signals to ensure Cabrera & Sons HVAC is prominently featured in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
